item.title: No Stomach Cancer Risk With Long-Term PPI Use
item.description: A large population-based analysis finds no association between prolonged PPI use and gastric non-cardia adenocarcinoma. Medscape Medical News

item.title: How Hospital Medicine Is Poised to Evolve This Year
item.description: Changes are coming, but this remains true: Hospitalists will be asked for more as their expertise grows. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Experts Warn Psychiatric Symptoms May Mask Hidden Disease
item.description: Takotsubo syndrome, frontotemporal dementia, gut-brain disorders, and tinnitus share psychiatric features that complicate their diagnosis and manageme...

item.title: Risk Factors for Early Development of Food Allergies
item.description: The study found multiple childhood food allergy risk factors but no link to vaccines. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Doctors Risk Becoming ‘Liability Sink’ for AI Errors
item.description: Lawyers warn UK liability laws may not protect patients harmed by medical AI, as the NHS accelerates plans to embed the technology across healthcare. ...
